prompts.name: mcp.instructions_v1
prompts.text:
Use x07.search_v1 for discovery.
Run the toolchain via x07.exec_v1 (prefer --json=canon + --report-out + --quiet-json).
On failures: x07.context_pack_v1 -> x07.patch_apply_v1 -> re-run x07.exec_v1.
Outputs are bounded; use x07.artifact_snippet_v1 or resources/read for full details.

prompts.name: x07.agent.playbook_v1
prompts.text:
Preferred loop (token-efficient):
1) Use x07.search_v1 for discovery.
2) Run x07 via x07.exec_v1 with argv/args and prefer --json=canon + --report-out + --quiet-json.
3) On failure, generate a focused pack via x07.context_pack_v1.
4) Apply fixes via x07.patch_apply_v1, then re-run x07.exec_v1.

prompts.name: x07.ast.output_rules_v1
prompts.text:
When emitting X07 x07AST JSON:
- Output JSON only (no prose).
- Include schema_version.
- Keep patches minimal and deterministic.

prompts.name: x07.debug.loop_v1
prompts.text:
Debug loop:
check/test -> context pack -> patch -> recheck.
Prefer context packs over dumping files.
